problem.title: Two Sum Indices
problem.statement: Given n integers and a target value, output two distinct zero-based indices whose values sum to the target. Every test with a valid pair has exactly one valid answer. If no pair exists, output -1 -1.
problem.input_format: The first line contains n and target. The second line contains n integers.
problem.output_format: Print two zero-based indices i and j separated by a space, or -1 -1.
